mapper.select: SELECT ho.*, u.nickname AS helper_nickname, hr.title AS request_title FROM help_order ho LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON ho.helper_id = u.id LEFT JOIN help_request hr ON ho.request_id = hr.id WHERE ho.id = #{id}
SELECT ho.*, u.nickname AS helper_nickname FROM help_order ho LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON ho.helper_id = u.id WHERE ho.request_id = #{requestId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO help_order(request_id, helper_id, status) VALUES(#{requestId}, #{helperId}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE help_order SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
